findingDetails.title: Stale README Version fields after 008 changelog bumps
findingDetails.evidence: README Version cites 1.13.0.0/2.2.0.0/1.10.1.0 but shipped changelogs are v1.14.0.0/v2.3.0.0/v1.11.0.0
findingDetails.recommendation: Bump the 3 README Version fields to match shipped changelogs

adjudication: F-iter2-001 REJECTED (false-positive): changelogs are the sanctioned home for phase/spec citations per sk-doc; v2.1.0.0 is pre-008 and documents a removal. F-iter2-002 CONFIRMED.
